title: Translation Bureau Act
description: Translation Bureau Act (Translation Bureau Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Translation Bureau Act .

provisions.title: Definition of "Minister"
provisions.content: 2 In this Act, Minister means such member of the Queen’s Privy Council for Canada as is designated by the Governor in Council as the Minister for the purposes of this Act.

provisions.title: Bureau established
provisions.content: 3 There is hereby established a bureau under the authority of the Minister called the Translation Bureau.

provisions.title: Duties and functions of Bureau
provisions.content: 4 (1) The Bureau shall collaborate with and act for all departments, boards, agencies and commissions established by Act of Parliament or appointed by order of the Governor in Council and collaborate with and act for both Houses of Parliament in all matters relating to the making and revising of translations from one language into another of documents, including correspondence, reports, proceedings, debates, bills and Acts, and to interpretation, sign-language interpretation and terminology. (2) All departments, boards, agencies and commissions referred to in subsection (1) shall collaborate with the Bureau in carrying into effect this Act and the regulations.

provisions.title: Officers and employees
provisions.content: 6 Such officers, translators, clerks or other employees as are necessary for the proper conduct of the business of the Bureau may be appointed under the Public Service Employment Act to hold office during pleasure.

provisions.title: Regulations
provisions.content: 7 The Minister may, with the approval of the Governor in Council, make all regulations that the Minister deems necessary or expedient for carrying this Act into effect.
